SEARCH
Package com.github.dakusui.symfonion.song

Class CompatSong

java.lang.Object
com.github.dakusui.symfonion.song.CompatSong
public class CompatSong extends Object

This class models the logical aspect of the entire musical piece, described by the application syntax.

Entries that directly matter in this class are as follows:

Entries (Compat)Song class processes
{
  "$noteMaps": { "<noteMapName>": "<NoteMap>"},
  "parts": { "<partName>": "<Part>" },
  "grooves": { "<grooveName>": ["<Groove>", "<Groove>", "..."] },
  "sequence": [ "<Bar>", "<Bar>", "..." ]
}

Each element in $sequence array is a Bar object. A bar contains notes and its related information played during a certain period of time.

  • Constructor Details

    • CompatSong

      public CompatSong(Map<String,Part> parts, Map<String,Groove> grooves, List<Bar> bars, com.google.gson.JsonObject rootJsonObject)

      Creates an object of this class.

      Parameters:
      parts - Parts of a musical work.
      grooves - Grooves referenced from bars.
      bars - Bars of a musical work.
      rootJsonObject - A root JSON object that barJsonObject belongs to.
